zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ballard of Horton於1445年出生在英國肯特霍頓時，他的父親Thomas Ballard51歲，母親Philipe Walshingham26歲。他於1470年11月12日與Elizabeth Isabella Downton在英國英格蘭肯特多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年10月24日在英國英格蘭享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ballard of Horton于1445年出生在英国肯特霍頓时，他的父亲Thomas Ballard51岁，母亲Philipe Walshingham26岁。他于1470年11月12日与Elizabeth Isabella Downton在英国英格兰肯特多福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年10月24日在英国英格兰享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ballard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English ballard ‘bald-headed man’ (compare Bald 3).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Balhard, composed of the elements bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’, and hard ‘hard, strong’. Compare Ballor .

variants.name: Ballon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Sergio, Alfonso, Cesar, Conchita, Emigdio, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Jose Luis, Julio, Ruben.  Jewish Hyman, Isadore.

French and English (Middlesex): from the Old French personal name Ballon, Ballun, derived from the oblique stem of ancient Germanic Ballo, a short form of compound names based on the element bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’ (see Ballard ).

variants.name: Bald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Inge, Karl-Heinz, Konrad, Kurt, Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, or a short form of various compound names such as Baldwin , formed with the first element bald ‘bold, strong’.

Scottish and English: from the Norman personal name Bald(e), Baud(e), occasionally Bold, a short form of the common ancient Germanic personal names Baldwin or Baldric, or possibly a survival of Old English Beald (compare Balding ); the relevant element in each of these is b(e)ald ‘brave’. As a hereditary surname it seems to have died out in England but survives in Scotland.

variants.name: Ballor
meanings: Altered form of French Ballard 2, reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. It is found mainly in MI.

variants.name: Bollard
meanings: English (Northamptonshire) and Irish: probably a variant of   Ballard  . According to MacLysaght, this is a surname of Dutch origin which was taken to Ireland early in the 18th century.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bolohard, composed of the elements bolo ‘friend, brother’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ballard of Horton was born in 1445, in Horton, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Ballard, was 51 and his mother, Philipe Walshingham, was 26. He married Elizabeth Isabella Downton on 12 November 1470, in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 October 1498, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ballard of Horton est né en 1445, à Horton, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ballard, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Philipe Walshingham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Isabella Downton le 12 novembre 1470, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1498, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ballard of Horton 1445 in Horton, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ballard 51 und seine Mutter Philipe Walshingham 26. Er hat am 12. November 1470 in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Isabella Downton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1498 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ballard of Horton è nato il nel 1445 nel Horton, Kent, England, il suo padre, Thomas Ballard, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Philipe Walshingham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Isabella Downton il 12 novembre 1470, nel Dover, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1498, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ballard of Hortonが1445年にイギリスケントホールトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Ballardは51歳，母Philipe Walshinghamは26歳であった。1470年11月12日にイギリスイギリスケントドバーでElizabeth Isabella Downtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年10月24日にイギリスイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ballard of Horton(이)가 1445년 영국 켄트 호르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ballard(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Philipe Walshingham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1470년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 도버에서 Elizabeth Isabella Downton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 10월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ballard of Horton nasceu em 1445, em Horton, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Ballard, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Philipe Walshingham, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Isabella Downton em 12 de novembro de 1470, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1498, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ballard of Horton родился в 1445 г. в местности хауртон, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ballard было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Philipe Walshingham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Isabella Downton 12 ноября 1470 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 октября 1498 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ballard of Horton nació en 1445, en Horton, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Ballard, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Philipe Walshingham, tenía 26 años. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1498, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
